use_cases: Showcasing portfolio pieces or creative work in an asymmetric grid layout
Displaying product images with interactive lightbox modal on click
Creating visual content grids for marketing or social media dashboards
Building image collections with smooth entry animations and staggered reveals
Enabling full-screen image viewing with backdrop blur overlay
ai_summary: A responsive Bento-style image gallery featuring an asymmetric grid layout with variable column spans, smooth Framer Motion animations for staggered item reveals, and an interactive full-screen modal with backdrop blur for focused image viewing. Uses Tailwind CSS for responsive grid sizing and includes a close button with hover states for accessibility.
